Title: Error when attaching Video file
Repro Steps:
Business users have reported an error message when trying to upload video file (MP4) to the attachments in both incident and disability management portals. 
Steps
Open disability management portal and select a file
Navigate to attachment and upload a video file  
Error message is displayed - "File type not supported"
